title: Confocal Laser Endomicroscopy (CLE)
source_data_quality_note: Source MD is widefield-fluorescence template (fan-out artifact). Physics below is grounded in canonical medical-imaging literature for this principle.

E.description: Confocal Laser Endomicroscopy (CLE): confocal laser scan produces the measurement through a 4-node primitive DAG L.laser_excitation -> K.psf.confocal -> S.scan.raster -> int.temporal, with time-integrated exposure and Poisson signal noise + Gaussian read noise. Recovery is posed as a linear inverse problem that inverts the forward operator to estimate the scene-side 2D intensity. Difficulty tier delta=3 with effective condition number kappa_eff~12; calibration-level mismatch (motion, photobleaching, tissue_contact_pressure) sets the accuracy floor at the Omega boundary. See the forward_model field for the closed-form imaging equation.
E.forward_model: y(r) = [PSF_confocal conv f(r)] + n; in-vivo via probe tip
E.world_state_x: Patient-side quantity of interest (attenuation / activity / perfusion / stiffness etc.)
E.observation_y: Clinical sensor output at declared resolution + noise

W.regime: Existence of the recovered 2D intensity is guaranteed within the declared Omega bounds. Uniqueness holds on the measurement-supported subspace; out-of-support modes are controlled by the declared priors. Stability is moderately conditioned (kappa_eff ~= 12); motion dominates the stability cliff; photobleaching and the remaining mismatch parameters contribute higher-order bias terms. Poisson signal noise + gaussian read noise sets the irreducible data-fidelity floor, while mild Tikhonov or analytic inversion is sufficient at the nominal Omega point.

C.solver_class: linear-operator + analytic regularisation [Wiener-CLE] | iterative maximum-likelihood (Richardson-Lucy class) [RL-Confocal] | linear-operator + deep neural prior [CLE-Net]
C.error_bound: Data-fidelity bound: ||x_hat - x||_2 <= C1 * sqrt(sigma_read^2 + alpha * signal) / sqrt(photon_count). Mismatch-induced bias adds + C2 * |motion| + C3 * ||x - x_s||_1 (best s-sparse / low-rank approximation residual). Iterative solvers achieve q=2 convergence (O(1/k^2)) near the MLE; epsilon_fn captures the monotone quality degradation across declared Omega.
C.complexity: O(H * W * log(...)) per iteration; learned variants: O(H W Z * F_theta_cost) per forward pass
